creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
I just hit the same problem, undefined reference to yylex in /usr/ 
local/lib/libfl.so, while building graphics/ender on another box. I  
noticed there is a flex 2.5.38_1 which corrects missing .la files in  
pkg-plist.  Unfortunately, that still does not help the situation, not  
that I expected the presence of any .la files to affect use of the .so  
file. I had to revert flex to 2.5.37_1 to build ender.

Maybe the libkate port has a problem since it's not listed as a port  
requiring flex for build. However, there seems to be a problem with  
current flex because I've seen more than one failure thus far. I don't  
know how many other ports might have failed had they been tried prior  
to reverting to the older flex.
